title: miconia prasina var. collina
intro: Miconia prasina var. collina is a variety of the Miconia prasina plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub native to Central and South America, commonly known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Miconia prasina var. collina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can be used to make a tincture or salve for topical application.
